ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time frame of the market data (e.g., 1 Week, 1 Month) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "avg_daily_vol" REAL /* Average daily trading volume */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_history" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time frame of the market data (e.g., 1 Week, 1 Month) */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "avg_daily_vol" REAL /* Average daily trading volume */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the market data (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_history_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" INTEGER /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, currency, commodity) */,
  "instrument_ticker" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector classification of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_instrument_type FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type") REFERENCES instrument_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchanges" (
  "instrument_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument-exchange association */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_exchanges_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code (MIC) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, trader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_instruments" (
  "user_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-instrument association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_instruments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument related to the alert */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of market event (e.g., price movement, trading volume) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event that triggered the alert */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the alert by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of setting (e.g., price movement, trading volume) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, trading volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "comparison_operator" TEXT /* Comparison operator used in the alert setting (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., stock exchange, broker, data vendor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
